title: GSSSB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Surveyor Posts
description: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 47 Surveyor Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the GSSSB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, s...
